items.headline: Saboteurs damage rail lines in north Italy, disrupt travel as Winter Olympics open
whyItMatters: Saboteurs damaged rail infrastructure near the northern Italian city of Bologna on Saturday morning, disrupting train journeys on the first full day of the Winter Olympic Games, the Transport Ministry
summaryParagraphs: Saboteurs damaged rail infrastructure near the northern Italian city of Bologna on Saturday morning, disrupting train journeys on the first full day of the Winter Olympic Games, the Transport Ministry said. Police reported three separate incidents at different locations, which caused delays of up to 2-1/2 hours for high-speed, Intercity and regional services. The ministry called it an act of "serious sabotage", adding that it echoed the opening day of the 2024 Summer Olympic Games in Paris, when saboteurs struck France's high-speed TGV train network, causing travel chaos. "These actions of unprecedented seriousness do not in any way tarnish Italy's image in the world, an image that the Games will make even more compelling and positive," said the ministry, which is headed by Deputy Prime Minister Matteo Salvini. The state-owned railway Ferrovie dello Stato (FS) had to temporarily close its high-speed station in Bologna, but traffic was slowly returning to normal by Saturday afternoon, i For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

items.headline: Mastering Derivatives: Determining economics of arbitrage trades
whyItMatters: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 Arbitrage trades are referred to as near-pure-
summaryParagraphs: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 Arbitrage trades are referred to as near-pure-alpha strategies. This is because the strategy is set up to generate gains regardless of the market direction. Previously in this column, we discussed how to fade rates using futures and how to fade prices using options. Typical argument against fading rates and prices is that the capital required to set up the trade is large and the return modest. So, why engage in such strategies? This week, we discuss how to decide if the strategy to fade rates is optimal to set up. To recap, fading rates involves shorting futures and buying the underlying and typically holding the position till expiry. The strategy relies on price convergence; futures price will converge to the underlying price at expiry. Note that the number of shares of the underlying must match the permitted lot size of the futures For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

summaryParagraphs: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 Ashwini Vaishnaw, Minister for Railways, Information & Broadcasting and Electronics & Information Technology, Government of India | Photo Credit: SHASHI SHEKHAR KASHYAP Union Minister Ashwini Vaishnaw on Saturday said India’s IT sector is moving to an AI-driven services model with coordinated efforts from industry, academia and the government. He said AI presents a major opportunity for India to develop a new model of services for the global market. Citing examples, Vaishnaw noted that AI-based solutions could be offered to global shipping lines and retail companies through global capability centres (GCCs) in India, creating opportunities for Indian engineers. The Union Minister for Electronics and IT added that, due to the government’s focus on IT services, a large number of GCCs are being set up in India. "At the last c For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

items.headline: India-US trade pact set to boost India’s data centre market sevenfold
whyItMatters: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 The India-US interim trade agreement will faci
summaryParagraphs: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 The India-US interim trade agreement will facilitate a 7-fold increase in the data centre market, said industry stakeholders. On Saturday morning, the two countries announced a framework under which India will purchase up to $500 billion of US products over five years, that is expected to increase trade in technology products and GPUs used in data centres. India has imported about 20,000-25,000 high-end GPUs worth around $2 billion in the last two years. Already, the market is slated for significant increase in these numbers, driven by market demand, AI use case maturity, tax holidays and various other tailwinds. The recent agreement will facilitate this growth in a big way, said Sunil Gupta, Founder, Yotta Data Services. “At its core, India’s AI future will be shaped by one simple question: how quickly can the country access, deploy, For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

The minister made an important observation – “India’s disease burden is observed to be shifting towards non-communicable diseases, like diabetes, cancer and autoimmune disorders”. items.headline: Zetwerk invests ₹100 crore to set up defence electronics facility in Bengaluru, to employ 1,200
whyItMatters: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 R to L: Ashwini Vaishnaw, and Rahul Sharma at
summaryParagraphs: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 R to L: Ashwini Vaishnaw, and Rahul Sharma at the inauguration Electronics manufacturer Zetwerk has set a defence electronics manufacturing facility in Bengaluru' s Devanahalli. The company has invested ₹100 crore in setting up the factory, and will employ 1200 people. The facility spread across 100,000 sqft is equipped with a state-of-the-art SMT, and FATP lines to cater to defence, and automotives sectors. The facility was inaugurated by Union Minister of Railways, Electronics, and Information, Ashwini Vaishnaw, and Karnataka's Industries Minister MB Patil inaugurated the facility. Zetwerk had earlier acquired Pinaka Aerospace in 2022. "With this facility, we are creating a dedicated manufacturing space that complies with aerospace and defence standards. The idea is to build a focused facility with the right certifica For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

items.headline: India-US trade deal: Tariffs on Indian labour intensive goods slashed
whyItMatters: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 In a big relief to Indian exporters, the US ha
summaryParagraphs: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 In a big relief to Indian exporters, the US has halved tariffs on the country’s labor-intensive goods–including textiles, leather, footwear and plastics–from 50 per cent to 25 per cent, through an executive order on Friday. A further drop to 18 per cent has been agreed to by Washington and is expected via another order next week. However, roll back of these 25 per cent ad valorem tariffs on Indian goods, effective February 7, 2026, is explicitly tied to India’s “commitment” to stop purchasing Russian oil. In the order, US President Donald Trump has warned that the levies may be reinstated if imports resume. Commerce & Industry Minister Piyush Goyal deflected a query on the US claim on India’s commitment to stop Russian oil purchase while the Ministry of External Affairs reiterated its earlier stand. It said, ensuring security of 1 For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

items.headline: NPS Swasthya brings a health wallet Inside NPS but there is a catch
whyItMatters: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 Medical bills arrive early, long before most p
summaryParagraphs: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 Medical bills arrive early, long before most people feel retirement-ready, and that creates a gap between health spending needs and long-term saving products. In that backdrop, PFRDA’s newly unveiled NPS Swasthya Pension Scheme is best seen as a medical expenses wallet built inside the National Pension System, not as a substitute for health insurance. The regulator is allowing it only as a trial, so that pension funds can gauge whether the idea works in practice, from technology and operations to customer protection. This trial is being run under what PFRDA calls a Regulatory Sandbox. In simple terms, the scheme creates a separate NPS account meant only for medical expenses, including outpatient (often called OPD) and inpatient costs. You can contribute any amount, and the money is invested by the pension fund under the NPS Multiple S For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

whyItMatters: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 Even as the equity markets heave a sigh of rel
summaryParagraphs: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 Even as the equity markets heave a sigh of relief over the uncertainty around the US trade deal after both countries reached an agreement, closely following the India-EU pact, the bond markets haven’t had it that easy over the past couple of months. As FPI outflows continued and the domestic currency fell against the dollar, the RBI sought to shore up the rupee and maintain adequate liquidity in the banking system. However, a high credit deposit ratio (82.2 per cent as of Jan 15, 2026), record cash in circulation (₹39.8 lakh crore), GST/advance tax outflows in December 2025 high RBI yield cutoff due to heavy short-term T-bill supply have resulted in a spike in short-term yields. In late January, the call rate touched 5.65 per cent, higher than the repo rate of 5.5 per cent due to the relatively tight liquidity scenario. Three-month ce For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

items.headline: Do gold and silver FoFs really mirror their ETFs and true metal returns?
whyItMatters: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 Fund of Funds (FoFs) based on gold ETFs and si
summaryParagraphs: + 266.47 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 + 5,185.00 + 266.47 + 50.90 + 50.90 + 75.00 + 75.00 + 3,428.00 Fund of Funds (FoFs) based on gold ETFs and silver ETFs have emerged as a convenient route for retail investors to gain exposure to precious metals. They are especially popular among investors who do not have demat accounts or prefer investing in a staggered manner through systematic investment plans (SIPs). In theory, FoFs should closely follow their underlying ETFs, which in turn aim to mirror domestic gold or silver prices. Since FoFs invest entirely in units of the corresponding ETF, investors reasonably expect returns to be broadly similar across the metal, the ETF, and the FoF. But does this hold true in practice? Data compiled from ACEMF suggests otherwise. For the one-year period ended February 5, 2026, domestic gold prices rose about 77.5 per cent — a return largely matched by gold ETFs. However, gold FoFs delivered returns r For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

summaryParagraphs: Three minor sisters in Ghaziabad died by suicide after their father confiscated their mobile phones due to their obsession with Korean culture. Investigations revealed the girls were depressed and unable to access their usual online activities. Source: Times of India.

summaryParagraphs: SpaceX faces a significant hurdle in attracting engineers and technicians to its Starbase facility in South Texas due to limited job prospects for their spouses. items.headline: NSE formally approves IPO in first step towards its long-delayed public markets debut
whyItMatters: NSE formally approved its IPO and cleared the formation of an IPO committee to oversee and execute the listing process. Such a panel is mandatory for companies without promoters looking to go public.
summaryParagraphs: NSE formally approved its IPO and cleared the formation of an IPO committee to oversee and execute the listing process. Such a panel is mandatory for companies without promoters looking to go public. This summary covers the key points. Visit the source for full details. items.headline: Elon Musk denies Starlink phone: CEO says no device in works
whyItMatters: Elon Musk has officially denied reports of SpaceX developing a Starlink phone, stating "We are not developing a phone." This clarification comes amidst speculation about the satellite internet busines
summaryParagraphs: Elon Musk has officially denied reports of SpaceX developing a Starlink phone, stating "We are not developing a phone." This clarification comes amidst speculation about the satellite internet business's expansion ahead of a potential IPO. Musk has previously expressed strong reluctance towards phone manufacturing. For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Times of India.
